slides.title: Welcome to hb-installer
slides.body:
This tool installs Atmosphere CFW, Hekate, and homebrew apps onto your Nintendo Switch SD card.

Before you begin, let's confirm which installation method works for your console.

If you already have a modchip installed, you can skip straight to the installer.

slides.title: Check Your Serial Number
slides.body:
Enter your Switch serial number below.
You can find it in the system settings under Console Information, or engraved on the bottom of your console.

slides.title: Unpatched - RCM Works
slides.body:
Your serial number matches an unpatched Switch.

You can use RCM (Recovery Mode) to run custom firmware without any hardware modification. All you need is an RCM jig and a USB-C cable.

Next, plug in your SD card so we can install the essential files.

slides.title: Possibly Patched
slides.body:
Your serial number falls in a borderline range. Some units with this prefix are unpatched and support RCM; others are patched and require a modchip.

The only way to know for certain is to try entering RCM. If the screen stays black after holding Vol+ and Power with an RCM jig, RCM works. If the Nintendo logo appears, your unit is patched.

Next, plug in your SD card so we can install the essential files.
slides.note: Verify your exact serial at ismyswitchpatched.com for a more precise answer.

slides.title: Patched - Modchip Required
slides.body:
Your serial number indicates a patched Switch, Switch Lite, Switch OLED, or a model not in the vulnerability table.

These consoles cannot use RCM. A modchip must be installed to run custom firmware.

Read the modchip guide first, then we will set up the SD card.
slides.note: If you think this result is wrong, verify your exact serial at ismyswitchpatched.com

slides.title: Modchip Installed
slides.body:
A modchipped Switch uses the exact same software setup as an unpatched console.

Hekate boots automatically on every power-on - no PC or jig needed.

Read the modchip guide first, then we will set up the SD card.

slides.title: Set Up Your SD Card
slides.body:
Insert your Nintendo Switch SD card into your PC, then select it from the dropdown below.

If the card is new or needs to be wiped, use Format to FAT32 first.

Then click Install Essentials to write Hekate, Atmosphere, and the update blocker.

slides.title: Set Up Your SD Card (Modchip)
slides.body:
Insert your Nintendo Switch SD card into your PC, then select it from the dropdown below.

If the card is new or needs to be wiped, use Format to FAT32 first.

Then click Install to write Hekate, Atmosphere, the update blocker, modchip firmware (uSK), and modchip utilities.

slides.title: FORMAT WARNING - ALL DATA WILL BE ERASED
slides.body:
You are about to format the selected drive to FAT32.

This will permanently delete EVERYTHING on the drive, including:
  - Any existing CFW files (Atmosphere, Hekate, saves)
  - All homebrew and game data
  - Any other files stored on the card

This action CANNOT be undone.

Make sure you have selected the correct drive and have backed up anything important.
slides.note: Triple-check the drive letter in the dropdown on the previous screen. Formatting the wrong drive is unrecoverable.
